title: Creamy Crispy Dutch Spinach Stir-fry
description: A buttery, bouncy-quick and delicious Dutch dish featuring spinach, suitable for a date-night dinner.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Cook the chicken breast for 5 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set it aside.
In the same skillet, add the butter and sauté the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the spinach to the skillet and cook until wilted.
Sprinkle the flour over the spinach mixture and cook for 1 minute.
Gradually add the chicken broth and heavy cream, whisking continuously.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until thickened.
Add the cooked chicken back to the skillet and toss to coat with the spinach sauce.
Sprinkle the nutritional yeast over the top and cook for an additional minute.
Serve the creamy spinach sauce over the chicken, topped with crispy fried onions.
Garnish with additional spinach leaves, if desired.
